breakdown: This PR fixes level-up regressions by replacing the private `_extract_xp_from_player_data` function with the canonical `extract_character_xp`, and modifies XP synthesis to prioritize `xp_awarded` from combat/encounter summaries before falling back to rewards_pending. The changes also rename wrapper functions for clarity. Test coverage is adequate with multiple edge cases covered. Type safety is maintained with isinstance checks and coerce_int helpers.
key_changes: Modify _synthesize_generic_rewards_box to prioritize xp_awarded from combat/encounter summaries
Add type checking with isinstance for combat_summary before accessing xp_awarded
Remove _extract_xp_from_player_data function after consolidating to canonical function
